name: Watercolor Storybook
description: Hand-painted storybook illustrations — Studio Ghibli backgrounds meets children's book art
art_style: Hand-painted watercolor illustration with visible brush strokes, soft wet-on-wet blending, and delicate ink linework. Reminiscent of Studio Ghibli background art crossed with classic children's book illustration (Beatrix Potter, Quentin Blake).
color_palette: Soft pastels with occasional vivid watercolor blooms — sage greens, sky blues, rose pinks, warm yellows. White paper showing through as highlights. Gentle tonal transitions.
quality_tags: Traditional watercolor painting, visible brushstrokes, handmade texture, fine ink linework, illustration quality, paper texture visible, professional illustration.
negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3D render, digital art, sharp edges, high contrast, dark moody, violent, horror, neon colors, AI artifacts, extra fingers, malformed hands, distorted faces, text overlays, watermarks, stock photo.
